data.content: Plan review approved. Root cause diagnosis verified: repo-switcher effect at lines 34-44 re-selects a repo whenever activeRepo becomes null, undoing the All Repositories selection. Shift+N shortcut bypass confirmed at app-header line 99. Existing aggregation paths and shouldChooseRepo dropdown already work correctly. Hydration guard approach is sound; test strategy covers regression risk. No invariant violations. Ready for implementation.
